stemHtml: Per Part-FCL, a privilege of the ATPL(A) holder is to...

options.a: exercise all LAPL(A), PPL(A), and Sailplane Pilot privileges.
options.b: act as PIC or co-pilot of any aircraft category in non-commercial operations.
options.c: act as PIC of aeroplanes in commercial air transport.
options.d: act as PIC of aeroplanes in multi-pilot commercial transport only.
